title: 1981-04-16_Pat_174.txt
key_claims: Finding evidence that their color-music-math transmissions are external requires the "biochip" model: a 5D organism (symbiote) has physically grown like a *mycelium* or root system into the human brain, allowing an interface.
This symbiote lies dormant (inhibited) in the human brain until triggered by specific visual configurations, such as the Christian fish sign (*ikhthys*).
When activated, the symbiote generates the phosphene graphics via radiation instead of light, functioning as the actual true self or "Thomas" identity from the 5D world (Rome 70 AD).

Sacraments operate smoothly because in 5D, a unitary object can exist at multiple times and places on the 4th axis (our time scale). For them, our timeline is just a spatial array allowing access across millennia simultaneously.
recurring_concepts: **The Symbiote (Biochip)**: The 5D organism serving as an interface, physically linking the isolated 4D human brain to the vast, telepathic 5D continuum of Christ's body.
reading_excerpt: Finding evidence that their color-music-math transmissions are external requires the "biochip" model: a 5D organism (symbiote) has physically grown like a *mycelium* or root system into the human brain, allowing an interface.
